query: SELECT id, recipientEmail, subject, status, createdAt FROM email_sends WHERE subject LIKE '%terms%' OR subject LIKE '%Terms%' OR subject LIKE '%Update%' OR subject LIKE '%agreement%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
